audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in the file are guarded: `gethostbyaddr/gethostbyname` results are checked at L38; `ParseJson` return is checked at L143; `FindMethodBoard` return is checked at L158. Chained calls `method_board->GetServiceBoard()->Service()` are safe because `ServiceBoard` constructor always calls `SetServiceBoard(this)` on every element of `_method_boards`, so `_service_board` is never NULL for any MethodBoard returned by `FindMethodBoard`. All protobuf `New()` calls use standard C++ allocation which throws rather than returning NULL.
